hero.title: Packers & Movers in Mizoram
hero.subtitle: Aizawl to Lunglei across the green hills — 479+ verified movers in Mizoram.

intro:
Mizoram's rolling hills, high literacy rate and the vibrant Mizo culture make it a distinctive state in Northeast India. ShiftIndia connects you with 479+ verified movers across Aizawl and Lunglei, covering the state's residential and government housing relocation needs.

From Aizawl's steep hillside buildings and narrow bazaar lanes to Lunglei's southern district headquarters, our KYC-verified vendors have the small-vehicle capability and hill-drive expertise that Mizoram's terrain demands.
whyUs: Mizoram's roads are among the steepest in India — Aizawl is built on ridges requiring careful load management on switchbacks. Our vendors use appropriately sized and loaded vehicles, waterproof packing for the heavy monsoon season, and carry ₹5 lakh damage coverage.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Mizoram?
faqs.a: Local moves within Aizawl start at ₹5,500. Aizawl to Lunglei (150 km on mountain roads) typically costs ₹10,000–₹16,000 including packing.

faqs.q: Which cities in Mizoram does ShiftIndia cover?
faqs.a: We cover Aizawl and Lunglei. For other district HQs, we coordinate through our Northeast network.

faqs.q: Do you handle moves during Mizoram's monsoon season?
faqs.a: Yes. Waterproof packing is standard for all Mizoram moves. Heavy monsoon months (June–August) may see rescheduling if landslides affect key roads.

faqs.q: Can you move from Mizoram to Assam or other Northeast states?
faqs.a: Yes. Aizawl–Guwahati via Silchar is our main corridor, with GPS tracking and transit insurance covering the full journey.
